War report hero description: Generate a local, template-based Japanese naval bulletin from full sortie sessions or individual practices.
War report ready hint: This plugin listens for sortie and practice results while it is enabled. Finish a sortie or run a practice, then open this page to review the latest report and recent history.
Poi environment required: This plugin only works inside Poi.
No recent battle hint: Enable the plugin, complete a sortie or practice once, then come back here. Reports are stored locally once a reportable result is captured.
Delete all confirm: Delete all stored reports? This cannot be undone.
War report settings description: KC War Report stores recent sortie and practice reports locally and generates deterministic Japanese reports without LLMs.
War report settings hint: This plugin is intentionally conservative. It prefers broad, safe wording over inventing unsupported details.
Settings limitation latest-only: Only the latest in-memory battle result is kept.
Settings limitation no-persist: Reports are not persisted across Poi restarts in v1.
Settings limitation history-cap: Recent history is stored locally and capped at the latest 100 reports.
Settings limitation battle-unit: Sorties are recorded as one report from departure to return; practices remain single reports.
Settings limitation japanese-output: Generated report output is always in Japanese.
Settings limitation template: The writing is template-based and may use broad phrases when battle detail is incomplete.
Detected admiral missing: No admiral identity detected yet. Open the port screen in Poi to refresh it.
